idea: baseline fast point (LTX_FAST: all_bf8_lofi + 6+1 steps) on prewarm build
notes: gen#1 replay total 5.44s (job 012954-11, HEAD 386ee5b0e2f). JIT 100% cache hit (3585/3585) = prewarm ok, zero cold compile. qgate NOT yet measured; 6+1=7-step is in the handoff quality-cliff regime — needs 11-step ref compare.

idea: qgate result for fast point (iter 0) vs 11-step bf16 ref
notes: REJECT: fast point (LTX_FAST 6+1=7 steps) min-PCC 0.356 mean 0.534 SSIM 0.637 vs 11-step bf16 ref (gate 0.85). Confirms handoff cliff: 7-step is a DIFFERENT generation, not degraded. The 5.71s caveat point is invalid at quality. Ref established: tmp/ref_11step_bf16.mp4 = 8.71s 11-step bf16 (S1 2.84/S2 3.49/VAE 1.14/aud 0.99).

KILL overnight path: existing ttnn windowed_scaled_dot_product_attention computes DENSE+mask (zero speedup, per its own header) and is single-device (loses ring fusion). Training-free masks fail quality (synthetic-QK PCC 0.49-0.52 vs 0.85). NEW finding: hot 29% RingJointSDPA = attn1 pure video self-attn, EMPTY joint tokens. L4 = new ring K-skip kernel (days) + likely finetune, NOT overnight. Decisive cheap next test: capture real attn1 Q/K/V, re-run probe test_windowed_sdpa_probe.py. If real p~0.5 PCC clears 0.85 -> fund kernel; else pivot to M3 (CCL/data-movement).

idea: gated baseline: bf8 quant + 8-step (6+2), default audio
notes: HONEST GATED BASELINE = 6.52s. vs bf8-11step ref (isolates step cut): mean-PCC 0.850 min 0.797 SSIM 0.80 — right at 0.85 gate, step cut HOLDS. vs bf16-11step: 0.812 (quant adds the rest). Refs: bf8-11step=8.75s, bf16-11step=8.71s.

REGRESSION not win: audio decode 0.88s -> 1.5s (+0.62s) with both flags on. Contradicts worker in-code claim (eager<traced). Traced vocoder is FASTER here. Dropped both flags. (Did not isolate which flag; audio not critical-path so deferred.)

RoPE fold INFEASIBLE (fused-norm kernel head-uniform; LTX rope per-head; needs C++ kernel ext, <1% E2E). Euler-in-trace FLAWED (folds i2v pin -> crashes t2v->i2v traced seq; win only 10-30ms). D2H-roundtrip SOUND but do-not-apply (60-110ms, 1-2%, big H2D stays). Net: easy host wins absent. Tracy stage-2 harness READY (tmp/prof_stage2.sh) -> running to settle compute-bound vs gap-bound.

WASH: 6.46s vs 6.52s baseline = 0.06s (noise), qgate 0.848 ~= baseline 0.850. Confirms DiT is CCL/data-movement-bound, NOT SDPA-compute-bound: dropping SDPA fidelity does not speed it up. Not adopting (quality knob for zero gain).

NULL: 6.50s vs 6.52s baseline = 0.02s (noise). Audio AdaLN tilize cost negligible at scale (worker est 1-2% did not materialize). Bit-identical (kept as video-path consistency, not a perf win). Edit in transformer_ltx.py:355,381,400,403.

idea: L4 DECISIVE: real-activation windowed-SDPA probe (block 24, Stage-2 attn1)
notes: FUND L4. REAL activations REVERSE the synthetic result: TEMPORAL window (attend +/-2-3 frames, full spatial) HOLDS quality PCC_avg 0.96-0.97 / min 0.91-0.93 at 2.7-3.8x attention sparsity, TRAINING-FREE (no finetune). Spatial windows fail (min-PCC 0.56-0.64). dense sanity=1.0. Path to faster DiT = temporal-banded K-skip ring SDPA kernel (~days C++, frame-major layout makes temporal window a contiguous K-range). Caveat: single block/step; confirm across depth/steps before kernel commit. Capture tmp/real_attn_qkv.pt (956MB block 24), probe tmp/probe_real_qkv.py.

idea: L4 depth spot-check: temporal-window probe on block 4 (early)
notes: CRITICAL REFINEMENT: temporal locality is DEPTH-DEPENDENT. Block 4 (early) FAILS the temporal window (T+/-2f PCC_avg 0.83 but min 0.23 — some queries attend globally); block 24 (mid) HOLDS (0.96/0.91). Early blocks set global structure (need dense attn), mid/late refine detail (temporally local). So L4 = DEPTH-ADAPTIVE sparse attn (dense early, windowed late), not a uniform window. Win ~0.35-0.5s (fewer sparsifiable blocks) -> ~6.0-6.15s. Needs a per-block mask-search across 48 blocks x steps. Still training-free, still biggest lever.

idea: Lever 5: SDPA-input bf8 CCL transfer (all_bf8_lofi_sdpa_bf8) — halve K/V ring-gather bytes
notes: REJECT: 6.48s vs 6.52s = -0.04s (noise) at PCC 0.876 (down from ~0.90 — eats >half the margin above 0.85). Added q/k/v/dummy typecasts (48 blk x 2 stages) offset the halved fabric bytes; ring gather is not the bandwidth-limited critical path at this scale. Wired the previously-dead _sdpa_input_dtype hook (ring_joint_sdpa accepts bf8, op verified). Edits reverted. COMPLETES config-lever sweep: all null/wash/dead; only real lever = L4 kernel.
